# sweets

🧁 Tools for building clinical PK data disposition tables and deletion
listings.

## Installation

You can install the development version of sweets from
[GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
remotes::install_github("shum461/sweets")
```

# Functionality

## Create dispositions and listings

- Track counts of flagged or deleted records in a table using
  the[`sweet_disposition()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sweet_disposition.md)
  function.

- Deletion listings are tables of records removed for each deletion
  flag. Sweets builds off of the [reporter
  package](https://reporter.r-sassy.org/index.html) to include a
  workflow of initializing a listing report
  [`build_report()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/build_report.md),
  populating the report
  [`add_listing_to_report()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/add_listing_to_report.md)
  and writing the listings
  [`write_listings_report()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/write_listings_report.md)

- See full details in the [dispositions-and-listings
  vignette](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/articles/dispositions-and-listings.html).

  🍬 Auto archive datasets before re-running code
  [`sweet_save()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sweet_save.md)  
  🍬 Hmisc::contents() but sweeter
  [`sweet_contents()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sweet_contents.md)  
  🍬 Track QC notes and findings
  [`airheads()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/airheads.md)  
  🍬 See if modeling is underway
  [`check_models()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/check_models.md)  
  🍬 Explore source datasets
  [`most_recent()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/most_recent.md)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_listing_to_report()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/add_listing_to_report.md)
  : Add each listing to the initialized report
- [`airheads()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/airheads.md)
  : Track QC notes and findings
- [`broken_pk`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/broken_pk.md)
  : Example PK dataset for dispositions
- [`build_report()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/build_report.md)
  : Initialize a listing report
- [`check_models()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/check_models.md)
  : Check if modeling in underway
- [`cnt()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/cnt.md) : Count
  observations and unique values by group
- [`cnt_chocula()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/cnt_chocula.md)
  : Compare two counts
- [`delimp_biscuit()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/delimp_biscuit.md)
  : delimp_biscuit
- [`get_listing_info()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/get_listing_info.md)
  : Get listing report info and data
- [`get_missing_combos()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/get_missing_combos.md)
  : Get missing combinations
- [`listing_table()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/listing_table.md)
  : make a listing table
- [`mootate()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/mootate.md) :
  Mutate and restore variable labels for sweet_read and other labelled
  objects
- [`most_recent()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/most_recent.md)
  : most recent
- [`pool_disposition()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/pool_disposition.md)
  : Make a pooled disposition table
- [`print(`*`<sweet_contents_tbl>`*`)`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/print.sweet_contents_tbl.md)
  : print.sweet_contents
- [`sourpaths()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sourpaths.md)
  : sour paths
- [`sweet_asmbdat()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sweet_asmbdat.md)
  : sweet asmbdat
- [`sweet_contents()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sweet_contents.md)
  : Description of all variables
- [`sweet_disposition()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sweet_disposition.md)
  : Make a disposition table
- [`sweet_read()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sweet_read.md)
  : Flexible file reader for SAS, XPT, and CSV formats
- [`sweet_save()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sweet_save.md)
  : Copy files from data directory to archive directory
- [`sweet_sponsor()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/sweet_sponsor.md)
  : sweet sponsor
- [`write_listings_report()`](https://shum461.github.io/sweets/reference/write_listings_report.md)
  : Write a listing report
